text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week appears to be a little under the
weather. I take her to the infirmary so she can get
some rest.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer! Once I rest up here, all my
exhaustion should be gone in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What? Wait a second. Are you who I think you
are? The Three Goddesses?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, hello to you, divine Three Goddesses! I wish
to become the top Umamusume in all of Japan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Three Goddesses appear to smile upon
hearing Special Week's words.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At that moment, a bright light floods the room.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, it was just a dream...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Wait. I don't know why, but I think I feel better
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her vigor restored, Special Week leaves the
infirmary with a spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's wish doesn't seem to reach the
ears of the Three Goddesses, and they depart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At that moment, a bright light floods the room.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh... It was all a dream... But it felt so
real...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to forget the dream she had, Special
Week fails to get proper rest.
